specSection:
seedExamples :: () → ()
seedExamples() =
  | ¬empty(backlog/docs/) ∨ ¬empty(backlog/decisions/) → skip
  | otherwise → {
      backlog document create <onboardingDocTitle> --type guide,
      backlog decision create  <templateDecisionTitle> --status "Accepted"
    }
ground_truth_rationale: backlog/docs/ is non-empty, so ¬empty(backlog/docs/) is true. The OR condition is satisfied, triggering the 'skip' branch. Seeding is idempotent: skip when any content exists.
